fields.name: Mixing
fields.description: Raw ingredients are combined and blended in the mixing machine

fields.name: Frying
fields.description: Mixed product is deep-fried in oil at controlled temperature

fields.name: Oil Draining
fields.description: Excess oil is drained from the fried product on drainage racks

fields.name: Seasoning
fields.description: Flavour seasoning is applied to the product in the seasoning drum

fields.name: Cooling
fields.description: Product is cooled on conveyor belts to ambient temperature before packing

fields.name: Packing
fields.description: Cooled product is weighed, packed into bags, and sealed
